special_mechanics.name: Angry Mode
special_mechanics.description: Special burst of energy mode that gives injured fighters enhanced power

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Throws
special_mechanics.description: Different characters have distinct throws and combat moves; includes German suplex, power bomb, judo throws, ninja splits, and wrestler aerial moves

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Pickup System
special_mechanics.description: Players can pick up weapons including sticks, guns, and grenades during gameplay

feel_descriptors: lacks speed and precision compared to Streets of Rage
tier_notes: Tier 3: No precise movement physics data available. Game is a beat-em-up with variable character movesets. AllGame review noted lack of speed and precision compared to similar titles. Character variety includes slow heavy characters (Lord J judo master) and quick characters (Kazan ninja). No technical documentation of jump mechanics, gravity, or sub-pixel systems found in available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Brawl Brothers article
